MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff James Blanding, is present.
Attorney, Michael Hall, appearing for the plaintiff through limited scope.
Defendant, Blanca Yolanda Lazo, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-18-2010 is vacated.
